firmware.title: Nothing OS 3.2(Galaga-V3.2-250507-1139)
firmware.description:
What's new in this update General improvements and bug fixes
🚀 Optimised Launcher animations for seamless app launches.
📰 Improved fluidity of Google News Feed.
🔆 Enhanced adaptive brightness.
✂️ Smoothened use of three-finger screenshot feature.
🛠️ Increased overall system stability.

Camera enhancements
🎨 Optimised photo colours and clarity.
🎥 Enhanced clarity of 4K 30fps videos.
⚙️ Improved camera performance under high load conditions.

Notes:
The device may experience temporary overheating and increased power consumption during the upgrade and will quickly return to normal after the upgrade is complete.

firmware.title: Nothing OS 3.2(Galaga-V3.2-250903-2153)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update General Improvements and Bug Fixes
🔋 Optimised power usage during WhatsApp video calls.
⚙️ Improved system stability and network performance.

Camera Enhancements

📱 Reduced heating when using the camera in WhatsApp for a better experience.
🖼️ Improved image clarity in certain Facebook camera scenarios.

Notes:
The device may temporarily heat up and increase power consumption during the update and will quickly return to normal after the process is complete.

firmware.title: Nothing OS 3.2(Galaga-V3.2-251103-2121)
firmware.description:
What's New in This Update Camera Enhancements

🎨 Optimised the HDR algorithm for more balanced tones and improved contrast.
🔍 Enhanced camera focus accuracy for fingerprint recognition in certain third-party apps.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.

firmware.title: Nothing OS 4.1(Galaga-B4.1-260415-1710)
firmware.description:
Nothing OS 4.1 Hi there. You’re now upgrading to Nothing OS 4.1, powered by Android 16. We'll be rolling out even more features for Nothing OS 4.1 in the future, so please stay tuned.
Take a look at what's included in this update:

New Features

⏲️ Introduced the lock screen clock face from Phone (3a) Community Edition, co-created with the community member Jad Zock, featuring an exclusive typeface style and unique waking-up effect.
📡 Live Updates now work across various scenes, such as Always-on display, notification panel, and the status bar, tracking real-time progress from apps, like Google Maps, just at a glance.
🎮 The Games app is now live, integrating various tap-to-play mini-games for relaxing. Discover it in the app drawer or on the homescreen.

Notes:
Live Updates compatibility with apps depends on local availability and specific app integration.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

📷 Improved overall camera stability.
🚗 Improved wired charging compatibility with certain vehicle models.
📱 Fixed some display errors in the notification panel and Quick Settings.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability and performance.
🛡️ Updated to April 2026 security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.
